name: Zhongxing Shenyang Commercial Building Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhongxing Shenyang Commercial Building Group Co.,Ltd engages in the merchandise retailing business in China. The company offers cosmetics, watches, gold and jewelry, attires, shoes and leathers, telecommunication and housing, textiles, and children goods, etc. through merchandise stores. Zhongxing Shenyang Commercial Building Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1987 and is based in Shenyang, China.
